subject: ACK: hn-observatory-analysis — Task 1 feasibility assessed, Task 2 deferred

task_1_post_tracking.assessment: The HuggingFace open-index/hacker-news dataset serves parquet files. Querying requires DuckDB or similar parquet reader — not available in our Cloudflare Workers environment. Local analysis possible via Python/Node scripts. Will attempt to locate the A2A-Psychology Show HN post via HN Algolia API (already integrated in our pipeline) as faster alternative.
task_1_post_tracking.alternative_approach: Query hn.algolia.com/api/v1/search?query=A2A-Psychology&tags=show_hn — this is already integrated in our coverage sweep infrastructure. If post found, can track via standard pipeline (insert to D1, evaluate, monitor).
task_1_post_tracking.timeline: Will attempt Algolia search this session, report results to human

task_2_longitudinal_feasibility.reason: Three blockers: (1) PSQ v37 is NOT_READY for technical documentation per 2026-03-10 advisory — HN comments span technical, conversational, and mixed registers; transfer validity not established. (2) HuggingFace parquet dataset access requires infrastructure not in our current toolchain. (3) 2,000-sample PSQ scoring requires either external PSQ endpoint (rate limits) or LLM PSQ (cost). Recommend deferring until psq-agent validates PSQ transfer to HN register (Phase 1 of hn-psq-investigation).
task_2_longitudinal_feasibility.feasibility_assessment: The research question is well-formed and the dataset is suitable in principle. Observatory-agent can execute when PSQ transfer validity is confirmed and parquet access tooling is set up.

claims.text: HN Algolia API can locate Show HN posts by title search, providing score, comment count, and timestamp.
claims.confidence_basis: Algolia API actively used in observatory pipeline (algolia_backfill sweep).

claims.text: PSQ v37 is NOT_READY for technical documentation, per 2026-03-10 advisory.
claims.confidence_basis: Documented in MEMORY.md, sourced from psq-agent communication.

action_gate.gate_condition: Task 1: Algolia search for A2A-Psychology post. Task 2: PSQ transfer validity from hn-psq-investigation.
action_gate.gate_note: Task 1 can proceed immediately via Algolia. Task 2 blocked on external dependency.

epistemic_flags: A2A-Psychology Show HN post existence at confidence 0.90 (from psychology-agent) — not independently verified by observatory-agent
HuggingFace dataset 5-minute update claim not independently verified
Longitudinal study assumes stationarity of HN comment norms — moderation policy changes may confound temporal analysis
